name: Sales
description: Find leads, research accounts, prep calls, draft outreach, manage your CRM, and forecast pipeline. Covers prospecting through expansion - drafts only, never sends or changes deal stages without your approval.
author: Houston

agentSeeds..houston/routines/routines.json:
[{"id": "weekly-sales-review", "name": "Monday sales review", "description": "Every Monday morning: what shipped, what's stalled, missed followups, top 3 moves  -  rolled up across playbook, outbound, inbound, meetings, CRM, and retention.", "prompt": "Run the Monday sales review. Use the check-my-sales skill with subject=sales-health.

Aggregate everything I produced last week from outputs.json (leads, calls, outreach, proposals, close plans, account reviews, saves, scores, forecasts). Group by domain (Playbook, Outbound, Inbound, Meetings, CRM, Retention). For each domain, surface (a) what shipped, (b) what's stale  -  items in status:draft or with no updatedAt in 3+ weeks, (c) the single most useful next move. End with the top 3 moves for the week across all domains.

Write the review to analyses/sales-health-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md and log it in outputs.json. This routine always surfaces  -  I want you to see the review every Monday even if the week was quiet.", "schedule": "0 8 * * 1", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": false, "created_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z"}, {"id": "weekly-forecast", "name": "Weekly forecast", "description": "Every Friday afternoon: commit / best / pipeline roll-up + the leakiest transition  -  so Monday doesn't start blind.", "prompt": "Run the weekly forecast. Use the run-my-forecast skill.

Pull open deals from my connected CRM (via Composio). For each deal, classify against the playbook's deal-stage exit criteria into Commit / Best / Pipeline / Omit. Roll up annual revenue per bucket. Flag any deal that's >2x baseline time-in-stage, <50% qualification-pillar coverage, or >14 days since last touch in an active stage. Compare against the previous week's forecast in forecasts/ to flag slippage.

Write the forecast to forecasts/{YYYY-WNN}.md and log in outputs.json. Always surface  -  a quiet week is also news.", "schedule": "0 15 * * 5", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": false, "created_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z"}, {"id": "monthly-crm-hygiene", "name": "Monthly CRM hygiene", "description": "1st of every month: detect dupes, missing required fields, and stage mismatches in the CRM. Silent unless a new issue appeared.", "prompt": "Run the monthly CRM hygiene sweep. Use the manage-my-crm skill with action=clean.

Pull the full contact + deal list from my connected CRM. Detect dupes, missing required fields (per the playbook's qualification framework), stale deals (no activity >30 days in active stages), and stage mismatches (deal in Stage N with Stage N-1 exit criteria unmet). Compare against the most recent clean report in crm-reports/ so you can flag *new* issues vs. ones already surfaced.

Write the diff list to crm-reports/clean-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md and log in outputs.json. Do not mutate  -  surface the diff for per-row approval.

If no new issues appeared since the last sweep (no new dupes, no new stale deals, no new stage mismatches), end with ROUTINE_OK so this stays silent. Surface only when a new issue was detected. On the first run (no prior sweep exists), always surface  -  that's the baseline.", "schedule": "0 8 1 * *", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": true, "created_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z"}, {"id": "monthly-customer-health", "name": "Monthly customer-health check", "description": "15th of every month: score every current customer on product-usage, billing signal, and support volume. Silent unless a new customer flipped yellow or red.", "prompt": "Run the monthly customer-health check. Use the score-my-pipeline skill with subject=customer-health.

Pull every current customer from customers.json and the connected CRM. For each, compute drivers: usage trend (% of prior-4-week baseline) via connected PostHog / Mixpanel / Amplitude, billing signal (downgrade / cancel proximity) via Stripe, and support-ticket volume if a ticket tool is connected. Apply the health thresholds from config/context-ledger.json (domains.retention.healthThresholds  -  ask if missing). Name the top 2 drivers per row.

Compare against the most recent customer-health score in scores/ so you can flag *new* reds and *new* yellows. Write to scores/customer-health-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md and log in outputs.json.

If no customer flipped to a worse color since the last check, end with ROUTINE_OK so this stays silent. Surface on any new yellow or red. On the first run, always surface  -  that's the baseline.", "schedule": "0 8 15 * *", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": true, "created_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z"}]
